prose:
The frontier-orbital gap of ethylene was computed using the `frontier-orbitals` skill in chemkit.

**Ethylene frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: read from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz`. SCF converged in 6 cycles.

HOMO energy = -7.61558 eV
LUMO energy = -0.17987 eV
HOMO-LUMO gap = 7.43572 eV

No warnings were reported.
